Class FinalEntrantListFragment

java.lang.Object
androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
com.example.codebase.FinalEntrantListFragment
All Implemented Interfaces:
androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultCaller, androidx.lifecycle.HasDefaultViewModelProviderFactory, androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner, androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelStoreOwner, androidx.savedstate.SavedStateRegistryOwner
public class FinalEntrantListFragment extends androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
A Fragment that displays the final enrolled entrant list for an Event, along with a capacity progress indicator and a searchable list view.

Satisfies user story US 02.06.03.

The hosting

invalid reference 
android.app.Activity
must implement FinalEntrantListFragment.FinalEntrantListListener to supply the Event whose enrolled entrants are displayed. Attachment fails with a RuntimeException if this contract is not met.

The capacity display shows:

  • An absolute count in the form enrolled/maxCapacity.
  • A percentage of capacity filled, shown both as a
    invalid reference 
    TextView
    and as a
    invalid reference 
    ProgressBar
    .

If maxCapacity is null or 0, it is clamped to 1 to prevent division by zero during percentage calculation.

  • Method Details

    • onAttach

      public void onAttach(@NonNull Context context)
      Verifies that the hosting
      invalid reference 
      android.app.Activity
      implements FinalEntrantListFragment.FinalEntrantListListener and retains a reference to it.
      Overrides:
      onAttach in class androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
      Parameters:
      context - the hosting
      invalid reference 
      Context
      ; must implement FinalEntrantListFragment.FinalEntrantListListener
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if context does not implement FinalEntrantListFragment.FinalEntrantListListener

    • onCreateView

      @Nullable public View onCreateView(@NonNull LayoutInflater inflater, @Nullable ViewGroup container, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Inflates the fragment layout, retrieves event data from the host via FinalEntrantListFragment.FinalEntrantListListener.getEvent(), and initializes all views.

      Initialization steps performed in order:

      1. Binds all views from R.layout.final_entrant_list_fragment.
      2. Retrieves the enrolled entrant list from Event.getEnrolledEntrants(), defaulting to an empty ArrayList if null.
      3. Clamps maxCapacity to 1L if it is null or 0 to prevent division by zero.
      4. Creates and assigns a FinalEntrantListAdapter to listView.
      5. Calculates the fill percentage and updates capacityText, percentageCapacityText, and progressBar.
      6. Attaches a
        invalid reference 
        SearchView.OnQueryTextListener
        that filters the entrant list on both text change and query submission.
      Overrides:
      onCreateView in class androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
      Parameters:
      inflater - the
      invalid reference 
      LayoutInflater
      used to inflate the fragment's view
      container - the parent
      invalid reference 
      ViewGroup
      the fragment UI will be attached to, or null if there is no parent
      savedInstanceState - a
      invalid reference 
      Bundle
      containing the fragment's previously saved state, or null if this is a fresh creation
      Returns:
      the fully inflated and configured
      invalid reference 
      View
      for this fragment
